Actions.Text: REFERENCE CHANGED TO WAYS AND MEANS

Title: Establishes the New York state rural ambulance services task force
Summary: Establishes the New York state rural ambulance services task force to conduct annual studies on the availability of ambulance services in rural areas and to make recommendations upon the findings of such studies; requires the department of health to submit an annual report detailing the findings of such studies.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public health law, in relation to establishing the New York state rural ambulance services task force
